bugs.title: Natural-language planner fails to route several read-only ops/code requests to structured ToolProposal
bugs.summary: Live tests exposed that the deterministic planner does not recognize several common Chinese phrases for read-only local ops and code workspace tasks. The underlying tools, router, effect inference, policy engine, and executors work; the failure is before routing, at natural-language intent mapping.

symptoms.input: 请获取这台本地机器的系统概况
symptoms.actual_behavior: Planner returns decision=answer with reason=no deterministic tool match, so no structured ToolProposal is routed or executed.
symptoms.impact: Read-only local system overview request is answered as text instead of executing the approved local ops tool.

symptoms.input: 请定位包含 `最小静态站点` 的文件，workspace: /www/wwwroot/test
symptoms.actual_behavior: Planner maps the request to code.inspect_project because wantsCodeWork matches workspace before any search intent is recognized.
symptoms.impact: The agent inspects the project but never performs the requested text search.

symptoms.input: 请打开 workspace: /www/wwwroot/test 中的 `index.html` 并确认页面标题
symptoms.actual_behavior: Planner maps the request to code.inspect_project because the read-file detector only recognizes phrases such as 读取文件/查看文件/打开文件, not this workspace phrasing.
symptoms.impact: A concrete file-read request can be downgraded to generic project inspection.

details: wantsLocalOps recognizes 系统信息 but not 系统概况 or 本地机器的系统概况.
wantsCodeSearch recognizes 搜索代码/查找代码/search code/search_text/grep, but not 定位包含 ... 的文件.
wantsCodeRead recognizes 读取文件/read file/查看文件/打开文件, but misses workspace-form phrases such as 打开 workspace: ... 中的 `file`.
wantsCodeWork includes workspace as a broad generic trigger, so unmatched code-search/read phrases are routed to code.inspect_project instead of the more specific code tools.

commands.meaning: Direct Router/Policy/Executor capability for ops.local.system_info and code.search_text works.
Planner still fails to map the live-regression phrases after the automatic fix was withdrawn.

observed_failures: ops_system_overview: Plan() produced no tool proposal, decision=answer reason=no deterministic tool match

live_test_history.note: This verified the suspected fix, but the planner code change was then withdrawn at user request. The generated report may still show this historical passing run.
Capability smoke still passes; planner regression intentionally fails and should be treated as the active bug signal.

suggested_fix_when_approved: Add specific intent coverage for 系统概况/机器概况/system overview and map it to ops.local.system_info.
Recognize locate/find/search phrases combined with 包含 and 文件 as code.search_text.
Recognize workspace file-open phrasing as code.read_file and preserve workspace scoping.
Keep these checks before the broad wantsCodeWork(workspace) fallback.
Keep targeted regression tests so the natural-language planner cannot silently regress again.

planner_v2_1: Planner V2.1 removed code-level natural-language signal dictionaries from normalize/signals.go.
Tool Card Candidate Planner is used for semantic tool selection.
The three live regression cases still pass through CandidateSelector -> SemanticPlan -> PlanValidator -> PlanCompiler.
ToolRouter, EffectInference, PolicyEngine, ApprovalCenter and Executor remain unchanged.
verification.planner_v2_eval: passed via TestPlannerV2 and planner v2 unit tests; planner eval fixtures added under evals/cases/planner
verification.global_live_tests: passed 8/8 after rerun outside sandbox with localhost PostgreSQL access

fixed_cases.input: 请获取这台本地机器的系统概况
请定位包含 `最小静态站点` 的文件，workspace: /www/wwwroot/test
请打开 workspace: /www/wwwroot/test 中的 `index.html` 并确认页面标题

constraints: Do not treat MCP live success as proof of planner correctness.
Do not let ordinary LLM text execute tools directly; the fix must still produce structured ToolProposal objects.
